results.rendered_html:
ūrjita a.
1 (a) Powerful, strong, mighty; mātṛkaṃ ca dhanurūrjitaṃ dadhat  R. 11. 64 ;  Bh. 2. 76 ; vigorous, strong (speech);  Śi. 16. 38 ;  Ve. 1. 13.  (b) Great, large, exceeding, much;  Mv. 2. 13. 
2 Distinguished, glorious, superior; excellent, beautiful; ˚śrīḥ  Śi. 16. 85 ; makarorjitaketanaṃ  R. 9. 39 ; 1. 93 ;  Māl. 7. 4. 
3 High, noble, spirited; ˚āśrayaṃ vacaḥ  Ki. 2. 1  spirited or noble.
4 Increased; deep, grave;  Ki. 11. 40. 
— taṃ
1 Strength, might.
2 Energy.
